notes: Iteration #88: V12 — orchestrator direction after V11 regression (kimi 2dc6dfc5 cycle-14).
V12 = V10 (no regime filter) + BTC-only + softer -3.5 ATR stop (was 2.5).
Rationale: V11 regime filter excluded recovery entries in w0 and didn't materially help w1.
ETH degrades more than BTC under regime filter, drop ETH.
Softer 3.5 ATR stop gives more breathing room during volatility spikes without single-trade blowups.
Hard user gates G1-G7 deferred (single-strategy hypothesis test).
Fees follow V5 convention (1bps/side, 1bps slip) for apples-to-apples vs V10/V11.
